title: 1 Filter to Rule them All!
excerpt: I should be able to filter in some way (e.g. select customers of type X) and then when I go to any other board, those items should be filtered by that same filter.  PowerBI has settings where you specify if the filter sh…

posts.author: mabecassis (Moe Abecassis)
posts.cookedHtml: I should be able to filter in some way (e.g. select customers of type X) and then when I go to any other board, those items should be filtered by that same filter. PowerBI has settings where you specify if the filter should apply to a) only the table you are on, b) the entire dashboard you are on, c) the entire workbook regardless of which page/dashboard I go to.
